name: agent-context-kit
description: Structured configuration templates for AI coding, DevOps, and security agents. Encode team knowledge into AGENTS.md, skills, and personas so AI agents read context automatically at session start.

coding.description: AI coding agent — code reviews, testing, changelog generation

devops.description: AI DevOps agent — deployments, rollbacks, incident triage, scaling, log analysis, IaC, health checks

security.description: AI security agent — vulnerability triage, incident response, secrets rotation, access review

usage.instructions: Copy the relevant domain folder from templates/ into your service repo. Replace all [placeholder] values with your team's actual tools, commands, and conventions. Point your AI agent at AGENTS.md as its startup config.

agent.description: Working multi-persona agent built with Strands Agents SDK

devops-filled.description: Filled-out DevOps example for a fictional OrderService

mainspring-energy.description: Full three-persona example for an energy IoT fleet management platform (based on Mainspring Energy)
